---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for the Angular SSR demo
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear description of what the problem is. E.g. "I need to visualize … in the dashboard but it's currently missing."

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Include any proposed UI changes or dashboard enhancements.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've already tried.

## Additional context

Add any other context, links to related issues, or screenshots here.
